title: PCH fast file not found compiling design under Verilator 5.019
body:
My test is ending without any errors running under Verilator 4.226.  I attempted to use valgrind, but cannot interpret the results.  I also used GDB, but it just runs to the end and then there is no stack and I have no idea where the issue is so sneaking up on it is almost impossible.  

So, I decided to move to a newer version of Verilator (5.019 devel rev v5.018-44-gb8417abee) to see if it has the same issue.  Unfortunately, I did a make clean before starting so that should have cleared out all the old files but the compile ends with the following fatal error for a missing file:

```
<command-line>: fatal error: VTestHarness__pch.h.fast: No such file or directory
compilation terminated.
make[1]: *** [/home/jkrim/verilator/include/verilated.mk:272: VTestHarness.o] Error 1
make[1]: Leaving directory '/mnt/data/projects/project/jkrim/CEP-Setup/cep_v4_4_test_verilator/CEP/sims/verilator/generated-src/chipyard.TestHarness.CEPVerilatorRocketConfig/chipyard.TestHarness.CEPVerilatorRocketConfig'
make: *** [Makefile:273: /mnt/data/projects/project/jkrim/CEP-Setup/cep_v4_4_test_verilator/CEP/sims/verilator/simulator-chipyard-CEPVerilatorRocketConfig] Error 2
```

The lines in Makefile (272-273 are not the commented ones below) are these:

```
#########################################################################################
# invoke make to make verilator sim rules
#########################################################################################
$(sim): $(model_mk) $(dramsim_lib)
	$(MAKE) VM_PARALLEL_BUILDS=1 -C $(model_dir) -f V$(VLOG_MODEL).mk
```

compilation terminated.
make[1]: *** [/home/jkrim/verilator/include/verilated.mk:272: VTestHarness.o] Error 1
